| Advice attribution | тАФ `not_applicable` | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | Ktor has no Spring AOP / AspectJ proxy model. AOP is not used in Ktor applications. |
| Aspect extraction | тАФ `not_applicable` | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | Ktor has no aspect-oriented programming construct. @Aspect/@Pointcut patterns are Spring-only. |
| Pointcut resolution | тАФ `not_applicable` | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | Ktor has no pointcut concept. The framework uses suspend functions and Pipelines, not AOP proxies. |
